'''Drextar Pym''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] from [[Excarga/Legends|Exargan]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented Excarga and the [[Herios sector/Legends|Herios sector]].

==Biography==
Pym continued to own stock in several companies even after becoming a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]], notably companies still affiliated with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Senator Pym also acted as the chief prosecutor for the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]] panel responsible for prosecuting former Imperial officials and military leaders, an affiliation which caused a former [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commando]] to attempt to kill him. Senator Pym was [[Marriage/Legends|married]] with two sons, [[Kyle Pym|Kyle]] and [[Dirv Pym|Dirv]], and owned a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]], [[V-3P5]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|Countdown to Disaster}} {{1st}}
